item.text: {"output":"Implemented T1 in `src/tools/video-editor/lib/auto-scroll.ts`. `createAutoScroller` now accepts optional `onTick`, stores `lastClientX`/`lastClientY` in `update()`, and invokes `onTick` synchronously after scroll mutation and before scheduling the next RAF. Batch checkpoint file was not writable, so no checkpoint file was updated.","files_changed":["src/tools/video-editor/lib/auto-scroll.ts"],"commands_run":["sed -n '1,220p' src/tools/video-editor/lib/auto-scroll.ts","git status --short src/tools/video-editor/lib/auto-scroll.ts","test -w .megaplan/plans/add-auto-scroll-to-the-20260326-2119/execution_batch_1.json && echo writable || echo not_writable","nl -ba src/tools/video-editor/lib/auto-scroll.ts | sed -n '1,120p'"],"deviations":[],"task_updates":[{"task_id":"T1","status":"done","executor_notes":"Verified in source that `update()` stores raw pointer coordinates before edge-distance calculations (`lastClientX`/`lastClientY` assigned at lines 31-34), and `tick()` invokes `onTick?.(lastClientX, lastClientY)` immediately after mutating `scrollLeft`/`scrollTop` and before `requestAnimationFrame(tick)` (`lines 25-28`). Checkpoint file was not writable, so progress was not mirrored there.","files_changed":["src/tools/video-editor/lib/auto-scroll.ts"],"commands_run":["sed -n '1,220p' src/tools/video-editor/lib/auto-scroll.ts","git status --short src/tools/video-editor/lib/auto-scroll.ts","test -w .megaplan/plans/add-auto-scroll-to-the-20260326-2119/execution_batch_1.json && echo writable || echo not_writable","nl -ba src/tools/video-editor/lib/auto-scroll.ts | sed -n '1,120p'"]}],"sense_check_acknowledgments":[{"sense_check_id":"SC1","executor_note":"Confirmed. `onTick` fires synchronously in `tick()` after scroll mutation and before the next RAF is requested, and `lastClientX`/`lastClientY` are updated at the start of `update()` before any edge-zone math so the stored coordinates remain the raw pointer position."}]}

item.text: {"output":"Implemented batch 2 auto-scroll integrations for marquee selection, clip dragging, and external dragover. `useMarqueeSelect`, `useClipDrag`, and `useExternalDrop` now drive the shared auto-scroller, and `useDragCoordinator` now exposes `editAreaRef` on the coordinator object so external dragover can use `coordinator.editAreaRef.current` exactly as required. The batch checkpoint file was not writable, so no checkpoint file was updated.","files_changed":["src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useMarqueeSelect.ts","src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipDrag.ts","src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useExternalDrop.ts","src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useDragCoordinator.ts"],"commands_run":["git status --short src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useMarqueeSelect.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipDrag.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useExternalDrop.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useDragCoordinator.ts src/tools/video-editor/lib/auto-scroll.ts","sed -n '1,240p' src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useMarqueeSelect.ts","sed -n '1,360p' src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipDrag.ts","sed -n '1,220p' src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useDragCoordinator.ts","sed -n '1,220p' src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useExternalDrop.ts","sed -n '1,240p' src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useExternalDrop.ts","sed -n '240,420p' src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useExternalDrop.ts","nl -ba src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useMarqueeSelect.ts | sed -n '1,240p'","nl -ba src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipDrag.ts | sed -n '1,380p'","nl -ba src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useExternalDrop.ts | sed -n '1,220p'","nl -ba src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useDragCoordinator.ts | sed -n '1,220p'","git diff -- src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useMarqueeSelect.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipDrag.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useExternalDrop.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useDragCoordinator.ts","test -w .megaplan/plans/add-auto-scroll-to-the-20260326-2119/execution_batch_2.json && echo writable || echo not_writable"],"deviations":["Added a directly-required support change in `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useDragCoordinator.ts` so `DragCoordinator` exposes `editAreaRef`; this was necessary for T4 to use `coordinator.editAreaRef.current` without threading a new prop."],"task_updates":[{"task_id":"T2","status":"done","executor_notes":"Verified `useMarqueeSelect` now owns `autoScrollerRef`, stops and clears it in `clearSession` (`lines 59-76`), initializes it in `onPointerDown` with `onTick` calling `updateSelection` (`lines 124-126`), and feeds pointer coordinates into `autoScrollerRef.current?.update(...)` before `updateSelection(...)` in `handlePointerMove` (`lines 151-153`). `updateSelection` still re-reads `editAreaRef.current`, `scrollLeft`, and `scrollTop` on each call (`lines 97-105`), so stationary edge scrolling expands the marquee against the updated scroll position.","files_changed":["src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useMarqueeSelect.ts"],"commands_run":["sed -n '1,240p' src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useMarqueeSelect.ts","nl -ba src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useMarqueeSelect.ts | sed -n '1,240p'","git diff -- src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useMarqueeSelect.ts"]},{"task_id":"T3","status":"done","executor_notes":"Verified `useClipDrag` now owns `autoScrollerRef`, stops it in `clearSession` (`lines 126-129`), queries `.timeline-canvas-edit-area` from `timelineWrapperRef.current` during `handlePointerDown` (`line 222`), and shares a single `updateDragState(session, clientX, clientY)` helper between pointermove and auto-scroll ticks (`lines 256-320`, `322-329`, `352-354`). That helper includes the full required path: `coordinator.update()` (`257-263`), `snapDrag()` with fresh siblings from `dataRef.current` (`267-277`), `session.latestStart` plus `actionDragStateRef` updates (`279-285`), floating ghost update/cursor state (`287-300`), and `computeSecondaryGhosts()` plus `showSecondaryGhosts()` for multi-clip drags (`302-318`).","files_changed":["src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipDrag.ts"],"commands_run":["sed -n '1,360p' src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipDrag.ts","nl -ba src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipDrag.ts | sed -n '1,380p'","git diff -- src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipDrag.ts"]},{"task_id":"T4","status":"done","executor_notes":"Verified `useExternalDrop` now owns `autoScrollerRef` (`lines 51-58`), lazy-initializes it once under `if (!autoScrollerRef.current && coordinator.editAreaRef.current)` using `coordinator.editAreaRef.current` as the container (`lines 92-105`), feeds `autoScrollerRef.current?.update(event.clientX, event.clientY)` on every dragover (`line 106`), and re-runs `coordinator.update()` directly inside the auto-scroll `onTick` callback while updating `latestExternalPositionRef` (`lines 93-103`). `clearExternalDragState` stops and clears the auto-scroller (`lines 60-69`), and `onTimelineDrop` also stops and clears it at the top before drop processing (`lines 132-136`). Supporting coordinator exposure was added in `useDragCoordinator` (`lines 15-28`, `166-174`).","files_changed":["src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useExternalDrop.ts","src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useDragCoordinator.ts"],"commands_run":["sed -n '1,220p' src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useExternalDrop.ts","sed -n '1,240p' src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useExternalDrop.ts","sed -n '240,420p' src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useExternalDrop.ts","sed -n '1,220p' src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useDragCoordinator.ts","nl -ba src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useExternalDrop.ts | sed -n '1,220p'","nl -ba src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useDragCoordinator.ts | sed -n '1,220p'","git diff -- src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useExternalDrop.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useDragCoordinator.ts"]}],"sense_check_acknowledgments":[{"sense_check_id":"SC2","executor_note":"Confirmed. The `onTick` callback in `useMarqueeSelect` calls `updateSelection(clientX, clientY)`, and `updateSelection` re-reads `editAreaRef.current.scrollLeft` / `scrollTop` on each invocation before computing the marquee rect. Because the auto-scroller mutates scroll first and then fires `onTick`, the marquee expands against the newly scrolled canvas with a stationary pointer."},{"sense_check_id":"SC3","executor_note":"Confirmed. The clip-drag `onTick` path now calls the shared `updateDragState(...)` helper, which includes all required steps: `coordinator.update()`, `snapDrag()` with siblings from current `dataRef`, `session.latestStart` plus `actionDragStateRef` updates, floating ghost position/cursor updates, and `computeSecondaryGhosts()` with `showSecondaryGhosts()` for multi-clip drags. No part of the drag-state update path is skipped during stationary edge scrolling."},{"sense_check_id":"SC4","executor_note":"Confirmed. External auto-scroll is lazy-initialized only once behind `if (!autoScrollerRef.current)` and uses `coordinator.editAreaRef.current` as its container. `stop()` is called in both `clearExternalDragState` and at the top of `onTimelineDrop` before further drop handling."}]}
